narrative_purpose: Introduce the guardian, scout, attendants, and tiger; communicate the warning; and complete the decision to respond.

beats.summary: The guardian awakens and sees the threat reflected at close range.
The guardian's full defensive stance and frontier position are established.
The wounded scout reports the failed defenses and imminent attack.
The guardian silently commits and draws the weapon.
Attention shifts toward the supporting force in darkness.
The two attendants intensify the mobilization through the drum rhythm.
The tiger arrives and confirms the guardian-companion partnership.

unresolved: tiger design and name differ in later revisions

canonical_facts: The guardian receives or recognizes the warning and commits to respond.
The scout, two attendants, and tiger form the supporting fantasy cast.

tolerances.implementation: Professional equivalents are accepted when semantic beats and handoffs remain measurable.
unresolved_cases: Black tiger versus natural yellow-and-black tiger.
Direct media-node ownership for the working candidate.

terminal_artifact: Approved mobilization sequence with all battle participants staged
